query:
-- 先获取玩家ID
SET @pid = (SELECT id FROM players WHERE phone = '18526239983');

-- 插入背包物品（来源：box=宝箱，roll=roll房）
INSERT INTO playerItems (playerId, itemId, source, status, recycleGold) VALUES
(@pid, 1, 'box', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 2, 'roll', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 3, 'box', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 4, 'roll', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 5, 'box', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 6, 'roll', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 7, 'box', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 8, 'box', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 9, 'roll', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 10, 'box', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 11, 'box', 0, '0.00'),
(@pid, 12, 'roll', 0, '0.00');
